target_text: Audio fingerprint confirms live human performance. Not synthetic.
original_output: The track is human-composed. The nuanced vocal delivery, the organic feel of the piano, and the emotional depth of the lyrics all suggest a human touch. Additionally, the slight imperfections and variations in the performance are characteristic of human musicianship.
final_output: Audio fingerprint confirms live human performance. Not synthetic.
